suggestions.name: Mont Blanc
suggestions.description: A more technical route up Mont Blanc via Mont Blanc du Tacul and Mont Maudit. Involves glacier travel, crevasse navigation, and steep snow climbing.
suggestions.matchReason: Alternative technical route on the same mountain

suggestions.name: Gran Paradiso
suggestions.description: Italy's highest peak entirely within its borders, often used as a training peak for Mont Blanc. Glacier travel with moderate technical difficulty.
suggestions.matchReason: Classic Mont Blanc training peak in the same region
